title: Japanese-Style Hue Chicken with Bun
description: A fusion dish combining the flavors of Japan and Vietnam, featuring tender chicken and soft bun.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and Vietnamese fish sauce.
3. Grill the bo over medium heat until slightly charred.
4. Slice the grilled bo into thin strips.
5. In a separate pan, melt the buttery over medium heat.
6. Add the sliced bo to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
7. Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned and cooked through.
8. Warm the bun in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
9. Assemble the dish by placing the chicken and bo on the bun.
